description_long: This is a disposable paper cup with a fitted white plastic lid, commonly used for takeaway beverages. The cup is decorated with a vibrant, pastel-colored illustration featuring cherry blossoms, the Tokyo Tower, and Mount Fuji, evoking a Japanese springtime theme. The artwork wraps around the entire cup, with pink cherry blossoms and green leaves set against a blue sky and stylized clouds. The lid is smooth, slightly domed, and appears to be made of semi-glossy plastic, designed to prevent spills. There is visible text and iconography on one side, likely indicating instructions or branding. The cup's overall appearance is cheerful and inviting, making it suitable for urban cafes or street-side beverage vendors.
description: A decorative paper cup with a white plastic lid, featuring cherry blossoms, Tokyo Tower, and Mount Fuji in pastel colors.
description_view_0: Front view shows the Tokyo Tower, cherry blossoms, and part of Mount Fuji with a clear sky background.
description_view_1: This side highlights a large cherry blossom branch with pink flowers and green leaves, with minimal text or icons.
description_view_2: This view displays vertical text and icons, surrounded by cherry blossoms and pastel blue background.
description_view_3: Back view features Mount Fuji, more cherry blossoms, and the continuation of the Tokyo Tower illustration.
